outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Ceasefire holds tenuously as strikes continue in Lebanon and Gulf states attacked
outlets.summary: CNN focuses on ceasefire fragility — Lavan refinery struck, Iran retaliates against Gulf states, Israel excludes Lebanon.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth 'misrepresenting' war progress, officials say, as ceasefire takes effect
outlets.summary: WaPo reports Pentagon officials contradict Hegseth's claims. More than half of Iran's missiles reportedly intact.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump declares victory as Iran agrees to ceasefire, Hormuz reopening
outlets.summary: Fox frames ceasefire as Trump victory. Highlights Hegseth claim of all objectives achieved.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran has undergone 'regime change' as ceasefire begins
outlets.summary: NY Post covers Trump's regime change declaration and 50% tariff threat on Iran arms suppliers.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain report attacks despite Iran-US ceasefire
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports on ceasefire violations — Gulf states attacked, first Hormuz transits, ceasefire terms comparison.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war ceasefire: What the deal means and why it may not hold
outlets.summary: BBC analyzes ceasefire terms, conflicting interpretations, and risks of collapse.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF admits Tehran synagogue was 'collateral damage' in strike targeting Iranian commander
outlets.summary: ToI covers IDF admission of synagogue destruction during Passover. Rafi Niya Synagogue 'completely destroyed.'

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Lapid: 'Never such a political disaster' — Israel wasn't at the table
outlets.summary: Haaretz leads with opposition criticism: Israel excluded from ceasefire negotiations, worst political disaster.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: Ceasefire result of martyred leader's blood and people's resolve
outlets.summary: Press TV frames ceasefire as Iranian victory. Emphasizes Pezeshkian's tribute to Khamenei.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran retains enrichment rights under ceasefire — Trump's version 'fraudulent'
outlets.summary: Tehran Times disputes Trump's claims. Iran's Farsi ceasefire text preserves uranium enrichment rights.
